title: "Startup Failure" Assignment
description: Please answer the 5 multiple-choice questions. The questions evaluate your understanding of the topics discussed in the "Startup Failure" lecture. Make sure to submit it before the due date.
descriptionText: Please answer the 5 multiple-choice questions. The questions evaluate your understanding of the topics discussed in the "Startup Failure" lecture. Make sure to submit it before the due date.

questions.text: Which of the following is NOT considered a startup failure?

answers.text:
4222

    
         
      
        A bootstrapped startup where the founders cannot expect to recoup more cash than the value of their capital and sweat equity.
